level.setting: A subterranean research facility abandoned in 1924, filled with bubbling vats and shifting shadows.

encounters.hazard: Flickering arc lamps that cause temporary blindness.

pickup.name: Alchemical Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves organic tissue and armor plating.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the assistant causes the emergency fire sprinklers to flood the room with volatile chemicals.

encounters.hazard: Uneven floor tiles that collapse under pressure.

pickup.name: Concentrated Solvent
pickup.effect: Negates the thick, mucus-like hide of biological horrors.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the creature releases a cloud of pressurized gas that must be collected to proceed to the core.

pickup.name: Explosive Catalyst
pickup.effect: Triggers a violent exothermic reaction when exposed to dark energy.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the automaton shuts down the forge core, granting access to the final inner sanctum.

boss.name: The Manifestation of Rot
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the catalyst into the central reactor to purge the entity.

level.objective: Purify the laboratory before the eldritch entity fully manifests.

level.setting: an ominous, decrepit Victorian manor and its sprawling, fog-choked cemetery

pickup.name: Silver Censer
pickup.effect: emits a holy mist that slows spectral entities

encounters.trigger: burning the gate locks reveals the path to the mausoleum

pickup.name: Corroded Key
pickup.effect: opens the heavy iron doors in the ritual chamber

encounters.trigger: dispersing the ghost unlocks the sealed basement stairs

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Oil
pickup.effect: increases fire damage against cursed entities

encounters.trigger: defeating the construct powers the ritual circle to summon the master

boss.name: Lich of the Void
boss.victory_condition: douse the boss with the holy oil then finish with flame burst

level.objective: exterminate the ancient lich residing in the crypt

level.setting: An abandoned Victorian-era asylum converted into a dark laboratory.

encounters.hazard: Leaking liquid nitrogen pipes freezing the floor.

pickup.name: Silver Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Coats the Shadowblade in silver dust for extra holy damage.

encounters.trigger: Opening the morgue gate triggers a screeching alarm that awakens the next nightmare.

encounters.hazard: Swinging surgical lights that restrict vision.

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Shard
pickup.effect: Infuses the blade with blinding solar light.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct causes a power surge, unlocking the heavy vault doors to the sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Flickering shadows that occasionally strike the player.

pickup.name: Cursed Heart Key
pickup.effect: Required to suppress the boss's immortality.

encounters.trigger: Killing the stalker reveals the hidden altar where the boss awakens.

boss.name: Eldritch Warden
boss.victory_condition: Use the Cursed Heart Key to shatter the boss armor and deliver a final blow.

level.objective: Exorcise the ancient evil controlling the facility.
level.reward: The Blade of Whispers, granting invisibility in low light.

level.setting: A desolate, mist-shrouded necropolis in a perpetual state of decay.

pickup.name: Silver Dagger
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to supernatural entities.

encounters.trigger: Opening the gate unlocks the crypt entrance.

pickup.name: Cursed Amulet
pickup.effect: Draws the ire of the undead master.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spirit triggers the ritual alarm.

pickup.name: Sanctified Oil
pickup.effect: Can be applied to a weapon to burn abyssal bosses.

encounters.trigger: The Golem's fall opens the path to the inner sanctum.

boss.name: Abyssal King
boss.victory_condition: Apply Sanctified Oil to the Longbow and land a critical headshot.

level.objective: Purify the desecrated shrine to break the curse.

level.setting: A decaying, fog-shrouded Victorian era graveyard filled with subterranean ruins.

pickup.name: Cursed Relic
pickup.effect: Allows the user to bind spectral energy.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Grave-Digger reveals a key to the Sanctum door.

pickup.name: Ethereal Essence
pickup.effect: Infuses weapons with necrotic rot.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Librarian releases a seal on the Void Chamber.

pickup.name: Soul Anchor
pickup.effect: Grounds spectral entities to the physical plane.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the chamber unlocks the Boss Gate.

boss.name: The Lich King
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the king's spirit to the floor using the Soul Anchor and execute with the Bone Scythe.

level.objective: Exorcise the Ancient Necropolis and claim the throne of souls.

level.setting: An abandoned, shifting mental asylum where walls breathe and corridors loop infinitely.

encounters.hazard: Swinging rusted meat hooks hanging from the ceiling.

pickup.name: Bottled Adrenaline
pickup.effect: Increases speed and attack power for 30 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main iron gate releases a blood-curdling scream that alerts the foyer guardian.

encounters.hazard: Greasy, slippery floors that cause the player to lose footing.

pickup.name: Heavy Chainsaw Oil
pickup.effect: Allows the player to rev the weapon to bypass thick armor.

encounters.trigger: Stepping on a pile of shattered glass triggers a trap door that drops you into the sub-basement kitchen.

encounters.hazard: Pulsing electricity surging from exposed medical cables.

pickup.name: Cursed Scalpel
pickup.effect: Provides a massive damage boost against the final boss.

encounters.trigger: Entering the theater activates a lockdown mechanism that seals the room, forcing a confrontation.

boss.name: The Warden of Woe
boss.victory_condition: Sever the Warden's life-tether by landing the final blow with the Cursed Scalpel.

level.objective: Escape the Asylum of Whispers by killing the Warden.
level.reward: The Key of Eternal Silence and a permanent 10% health regeneration buff.

pickup.name: flask of sunlight
pickup.effect: illuminates hidden sigils

encounters.trigger: approaching the central glass dome awakens the next guardian

pickup.name: iron-bound locket
pickup.effect: dampens necrotic energy

encounters.trigger: shattering the construct reveals the master key for the vault

pickup.name: silver pruning shears
pickup.effect: inflicts critical damage on boss

encounters.trigger: defeating the shadow opens the gates to the silent garden

boss.name: the eternal gardener
boss.victory_condition: sever the spirit roots connecting the boss to the earth

level.objective: purify the garden of the blight

level.setting: A Victorian manor frozen in a surreal dream state

pickup.name: Mirror Prism
pickup.effect: Reflects magical illusions to blind foes

encounters.trigger: Opening the book reveals a map to the Conservatory

pickup.name: Starlight Vials
pickup.effect: Provides bright illumination to reveal hidden paths

encounters.trigger: Defeating the plant releases a golden key to the Clocktower

pickup.name: Temporal Lens
pickup.effect: Slows time for enemies caught in an illusion

encounters.trigger: Shattering the marionette unlocks the attic hatch for the final battle

boss.name: The Illusionist's Shadow
boss.victory_condition: Use the lens to destabilize the shadow's form while casting an illusion

level.objective: Escape the mansion before the midnight bell chimes

level.setting: A volatile, floating clockwork metropolis falling from the sky

encounters.hazard: High-pressure steam jets that deal intermittent damage

pickup.name: Superheated Coil
pickup.effect: Increases damage against icy mechanical components

encounters.trigger: Destroying the pressure valve to open the engine room gate

encounters.hazard: Crushing metallic gears moving in erratic patterns

pickup.name: Conductive Lubricant
pickup.effect: Short-circuits electrical shielding on armored bosses

encounters.trigger: Overclocking the central generator to stabilize the lift platform

encounters.hazard: Rapidly spinning clock hands that sweep the floor

pickup.name: Brass Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the central core of the Final Automaton

encounters.trigger: Activating the emergency lockdown sequence to access the boss lair

boss.name: The Iron Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Insert the key to overload the Monarch's core while shielding from his cannon fire

level.objective: Sabotage the central boiler to prevent the city from launching

level.setting: An abandoned, mist-filled clockwork steampunk laboratory deep underground.

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Allows the artificer to overload electrical systems.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the steam valve triggers the mechanism to release the spider.

pickup.name: Pressurized Solvent Tank
pickup.effect: Corrodes heavy metallic armor plates.

encounters.trigger: Pulling the central lever opens the archive and awakens the rust automaton.

pickup.name: Master Gear Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main furnace chamber.

encounters.trigger: Stepping onto the bridge triggers a lockout, forcing a confrontation to unlock the boss door.

boss.name: The Great Steam Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Gear Key into the core to vent its pressure.

level.objective: Deactivate the ancient steam core at the heart of the clockwork facility.
level.reward: The blueprint for an Eternal Motion Engine.

level.setting: The Floating City of Brass and Bubbles

encounters.hazard: Leaking oil patches that slow player movement.

pickup.name: Steam-Pressure Valve
pickup.effect: Can be used to open heavy pressure doors.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main gate causes the rust to flake off and animate the sentry.

pickup.name: Crystal Catalyst
pickup.effect: Increases elemental reaction potency.

encounters.trigger: Turning the Steam-Pressure Valve releases the pressure that wakes the cricket.

pickup.name: Master Gear Key
pickup.effect: Allows access to the Boss Control Deck.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Crystal Catalyst into the core triggers the final machine defense.

boss.name: Grand Cogsworth Regulator
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss by inserting the Master Gear Key into its main processing port.

level.objective: Restore the flow of whimsical essence to the floating city.
level.reward: The Golden Alembic of Eternal Synthesis

level.setting: An abandoned, smoke-filled industrial cathedral floating above a smog-choked metropolis.

encounters.hazard: Leaking superheated steam venting at random intervals.

pickup.name: High-Pressure Oil Canister
pickup.effect: Lubricates rusted gears or jams mechanical joints.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentry releases the security lockdown on the main steam pipeline.

encounters.hazard: Crushing metallic pistons that pulse in rhythmic patterns.

pickup.name: Magnetic Resonator
pickup.effect: Disrupts electromagnetically shielded components.

encounters.trigger: Jamming the gears with the oil reveals a hidden control panel for the boss chamber.

encounters.hazard: Rising floor temperatures causing constant environmental damage.

pickup.name: Titanium Override Key
pickup.effect: Decouples the primary power couplings on the boss.

encounters.trigger: Disabling the marauder forces the emergency door to the boss arena to retract.

boss.name: Grand Arch-Engineers Titan
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to disable the coolant system and overload the engine core.

level.objective: Sabotage the Great Steam Generator to halt the imperial conquest.
level.reward: The Master Gear schematic, allowing the creation of perpetual energy devices.

level.setting: The Ominous Industrial Spire of Coghaven

pickup.name: Conductive Fluid
pickup.effect: Increases elemental damage against metal surfaces

encounters.trigger: Approaching the pressure valve activates the Automaton patrol.

enemy.name: Clockwork Saboteur
enemy.weakness: Coated with Conductive Fluid for maximum conductivity

pickup.name: High-Voltage Capacitor
pickup.effect: Allows for a concentrated shock burst

encounters.trigger: Opening the main forge gate triggers the ambush.

enemy.name: Steam Goliath
enemy.weakness: High-Voltage Capacitor burst to the sensory array

pickup.name: Ancient Gear Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber's primary dampener

encounters.trigger: Crossing the threshold forces the bridge to retract, locking you in.

boss.name: Grand Gear-Master
boss.weakness: Ancient Gear Key used to disable the boss's steam-shield
boss.victory_condition: Defeat the boss after disabling his shield with the key.

level.objective: Overload the central pressure core to stop the smog machine.

level.setting: a desolate city suspended above a sea of smog

pickup.name: temporal gear
pickup.effect: allows minor time-dilation

encounters.trigger: destroying the sentry releases a temporal gear

pickup.name: pressure valve key
pickup.effect: removes environmental pressure buildup

encounters.trigger: the spider guards a pressure valve key

pickup.name: spire master key
pickup.effect: bypasses the boss shield

encounters.trigger: defeating the golem unlocks the command spire

boss.name: the clockwork architect
boss.victory_condition: drain the boss health after shield deactivation

level.objective: disable the chronos-engine to restore time flow

level.setting: The derelict, fog-choked Clockwork Foundry at the edge of the industrial wasteland.

pickup.name: Oil-Stained Gauntlet
pickup.effect: Increases earthen projectile speed by 50%.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the skitterer reveals a brass key to the boiler room.

pickup.name: Crystalline Focus
pickup.effect: Allows the geomancer to transmute metal into brittle shale.

encounters.trigger: Breaking the sentinel triggers the descent of the main platform into the core.

pickup.name: Master Keygear
pickup.effect: Absorbs raw energy to weaken mechanical bosses.

encounters.trigger: Dismantling the knight unlocks the pressurized seal to the command deck.

boss.name: Grand Arch-Clockmaker
boss.victory_condition: Short-circuit the Arch-Clockmaker by inserting the Master Keygear into the central processor.

level.objective: Deactivate the steam core to stop the smog-plague machine.
level.reward: The Ancient Geode Core and title of Warden of the Earth.

level.setting: A floating city of brass and polished mahogany above the clouds

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the pressure valves for the next area

pickup.name: Hydraulic Lubricant
pickup.effect: Allows the paladin to jam mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: The spider drops a master cog that unlocks the observation deck door

pickup.name: Crystal Oscillator
pickup.effect: Resonates with engine core frequency

encounters.trigger: The fallen sentinel reveals the emergency override terminal for the boss room

boss.name: Aether-Powered Engine Heart
boss.victory_condition: Insert the oscillator into the core to dampen the chaotic energy pulses

level.objective: Stabilize the central clockwork engine to restore serenity to the city
